# Transcrição: 12. Barney Frank 

- **Fonte:** 12. Barney Frank 
- **Duração:** 01:01
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:01]

Let's face it, everybody's got two cents and everybody's got two minutes. So here's my two cents in under two minutes. I don't mean for this to be political, but I gotta tell you, I'm so passionate about this that I would like to suggest and I would like all of you to back me up on this, that we have a new national holiday in America. The day Barney Frank retired should become a national holiday. Barney is leaving, man. Now look, don't take this as a political thing. I just don't like the guy. Never have liked him, don't like the way he looks, don't like the way he talks. Definitely don't like what he stands for. Barney Franks is gone. A man with two first names should not be allowed to stand in any office in the land. Okay? If you're with me on this, share this message. Barney, go on home, my brother. Barney Franks, the man that suggested that everybody in America, everybody should own a home. Look how much trouble you got us into, my brother Barney. Now you go home.
